title: Specialized Information and Referral * Immigration Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Specialized Information and Referral * Immigration Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Assistive Technology Issues Blindness Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Deafness Disabilities Issues Down Syndrome Mental Health Issues Older Adult/Aging Issues Immigration Issues Abused Lesbians/Gay Individuals Abused Transgender Individuals LGBTQ2+ Issues Transgender Individuals Offender/Ex-Offender Issues Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE SANCTUARY PROMISE HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Tracks and reports sanctuary promise violations. Provides victim and witness support, information, and a referral hotline. The Oregon Department of Justice (ODOJ) may open an investigation into reported sanctuary promise law violations. Hotline advocates do not control the outcome of ODOJ investigations or decisions to sanction a perpetrator of a violation. 1162 Court Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (884) 924-7829 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND IMMIGRANT RIGHTS COALITION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advocacy and services to protect and empower the immigrant community including a hotline to report local Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) sightings, assistance with locating loved ones who have been detained or deported, education on immigrant rights including free Know Your Rights fliers and handouts, drop-in resource center, and information and referral to additional resources such as legal aid or accompaniment to check-ins at the ICE office. Also offers volunteer opportunities. 4122 S Moody Avenue Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Resource Center: Monday-Friday 7:45am-noon Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 622-1510 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE SANCTUARY PROMISE HOTLINE PORTLAND IMMIGRANT RIGHTS COALITION PORTLAND IMMIGRANT RIGHTS COALITION
